name.description: Specifies the name of the virtual machine scale set resource. Changing this forces a new resource to be created.

network_profile.type: list(object({name: string, primary: bool, accelerated_networking: optional(bool), ip_forwarding: optional(bool), network_security_group_id: optional(string), dns_settings: list(object({dns_servers: list(string)})), ip_configuration: list(object({name: string, subnet_id: string, application_gateway_backend_address_pool_ids: list(string), load_balancer_backend_address_pool_ids: list(string), load_balancer_inbound_nat_rules_ids: list(string), primary: bool, application_security_group_ids: list(string), public_ip_address_configuration: list(object({name: string, idle_timeout: number, domain_name_label: string}))}))}))

os_profile.type: list(object({computer_name_prefix: string, admin_username: string, admin_password: optional(string), custom_data: optional(string)}))

os_profile_windows_config.type: list(object({provision_vm_agent: optional(bool), enable_automatic_updates: optional(bool), winrm: list(object({protocol: string, certificate_url: optional(string)})), additional_unattend_config: list(object({pass: string, component: string, setting_name: string, content: string}))}))

os_profile_linux_config.type: list(object({disable_password_authentication: optional(bool), ssh_keys: list(object({key_data: optional(string), path: string}))}))

proximity_placement_group_id.description: The ID of the Proximity Placement Group to which this Virtual Machine should be assigned. Changing this forces a new resource to be created

sku.type: list(object({name: string, capacity: number, tier: optional(string)}))

storage_profile_os_disk.type: list(object({create_option: string, name: optional(string), vhd_containers: list(string), managed_disk_type: optional(string), caching: optional(string), image: optional(string), os_type: optional(string)}))

upgrade_policy_mode.description: Specifies the mode of an upgrade to virtual machines in the scale set. When choosing Rolling, you will need to set a health probe.

automatic_os_upgrade.description: Automatic OS patches can be applied by Azure to your scaleset.

extension.type: list(object({name: string, publisher: string, type: string, type_handler_version: string, auto_upgrade_minor_version: optional(bool), provision_after_extensions: list(string), settings: optional(string), protected_settings: string}))
extension.description: Can be specified multiple times to add extension profiles to the scale set.

eviction_policy.description: Specifies the eviction policy for Virtual Machines in this Scale Set. Changing this forces a new resource to be created.

health_probe_id.description: Specifies the identifier for the load balancer health probe. Required when using Rolling as your `Upgrade Policy Mode`.

license_type.description: Specifies the Windows OS license type.

os_profile_secrets.type: list(object({source_vault_id: string, vault_certificates: list(object({certificate_url: string, certificate_store: optional(string)}))}))
os_profile_secrets.description: Specifies the Windows OS license type.

overprovision.description: Specifies whether the virtual machine scale set should be overprovisioned.

plan.type: list(object({name: string, publisher: string, product: string}))

priority.description: Specifies the priority for the Virtual Machines in the Scale Set. Changing this forces a new resource to be created.

rolling_upgrade_policy.type: list(object({max_batch_instance_percent: optional(number), max_unhealthy_instance_percent: optional(number), max_unhealthy_upgraded_instance_percent: optional(number), pause_time_between_batches: optional(string)}))
rolling_upgrade_policy.description: A rolling_upgrade_policy block. This is only applicable when the `Upgrade Policy Mode` is Rolling.

single_placement_group.description: Specifies whether the scale set is limited to a single placement group with a maximum size of 100 virtual machines. If set to false, managed disks must be used. Changing this forces a new resource to be created.

tags.description: A mapping of tags to assign to the resource.

zones.description: A collection of availability zones to spread the Virtual Machines over.

storage_profile_data_disk.type: list(object({lun: number, create_option: string, caching: optional(string), disk_size_gb: optional(number), managed_disk_type: optional(string)}))

storage_profile_image_reference.type: list(object({id: optional(number), publisher: optional(string), offer: optional(string), sku: optional(string), version: optional(string)}))

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.

location.description: Location that this resource will be created in. (e.g. eastus2, southeastasia)
